Ancients
PTOLEMAIC EGYPT. Ptolemy II Philadelphus (285/4-246 BC), with Arsinöe II, Ptolemy I, and Berenice I. AV tetradrachm (half-mnaieion) or pentekontadrachmon (50 drachm) (20mm, 13.83 gm, 12h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 5/5. Alexandria, before August 272 BC. AΔEΛΦΩN, jugate busts right of Ptolemy II, diademed and draped, and Arsinöe II, diademed and veiled; Galatian shield decorated with thunderbolt behind, dotted border / ΘEΩN, jugate busts right of Ptolemy I, diademed and draped, and Berenice ...

1. Sicily, Acragas Ca. 425-406 BC AE Hemilitron, eagle clutches hare, rev. crab and hipocamp. NGC VF.
2. Ptolemaic Kingdom, Cle
sales.description:
4-piece lot of Graded and Encapsulated Ancient Greek Coins. Consists of:
1. Sicily, Acragas Ca. 425-406 BC AE Hemilitron, eagle clutches hare, rev. crab and hipocamp. NGC VF.
2. Ptolemaic Kingdom, Cleopatra II and Ptolemy IX, AR Tetradrachm 116-107 BC. NGC
Fine.
3. Ptolemaic King Ptolemy X, 107-88 BC AR Tetradrachm. NGC Fine.
4. Phoenicia Shekel of Tyre, AD 29-30.  "30 Pieces of Silver" Jerusalem mint. ICG AU-50.  Estimated Value $500 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection;....
